name: adia-ui-authoring routing accuracy corpus
purpose: Routing-eval corpus for adia-ui-authoring. Each phrase declares whether adia-ui-authoring SHOULD be the routing target. Scored by ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/lib/run-skill-evals.mjs against the skill's description + frontmatter (heuristic token overlap).
scoring_notes: Scored heuristically — the bundled scorer uses token-overlap between phrase and skill description. This is a SIGNAL, not ground truth. Treat misroutes as a prompt to tighten the skill description, NOT as definitive harness behavior. The real harness routing requires LLM evaluation.
scope: adia-ui-authoring routing — does this phrase activate adia-ui-authoring?

phrases.phrase: add a new button-ui primitive component
phrases.rationale: Canonical Mode 1 (author NEW primitive).

phrases.phrase: build a new <toggle-ui> component from scratch
phrases.rationale: Mode 1 phrasing: 'build a `<foo-ui>`'.

phrases.phrase: create a new primitive web component in packages/web-components
phrases.rationale: Mode 1 explicit packages/web-components path mention.

phrases.phrase: add a new prop to table-ui
phrases.rationale: Mode 2 (modify EXISTING primitive — add a prop to `<x-ui>`).

phrases.phrase: fix the CSS in card-ui to handle the new bleed variant
phrases.rationale: Mode 2 (modify existing primitive CSS).

phrases.phrase: update the input-ui yaml to add a placeholder attribute
phrases.rationale: Mode 2 (update yaml SoT for existing primitive).

phrases.phrase: build the chat-shell composition with the new sidebar slot
phrases.rationale: Mode 3 (author a SHELL).

phrases.phrase: author a new web-module shell at packages/web-modules/editor/editor-shell
phrases.rationale: Mode 3 — explicit web-modules + shell.

phrases.phrase: add a pane behaviour to admin-shell per ADR-0023
phrases.rationale: Mode 3 — explicit ADR-0023 mention (bespoke shell rules).

phrases.phrase: promote this inline content to a shared web-modules module
phrases.rationale: Mode 4 (promote INLINE → MODULE).

phrases.phrase: this content keeps repeating across apps, extract to a shared module
phrases.rationale: Mode 4 — explicit repetition trigger.

phrases.phrase: lift this billing-summary block from apps/saas to web-modules
phrases.rationale: Mode 4 — lift inline page content to reusable module.

phrases.phrase: audit the four-axis contract for table-ui
phrases.rationale: Mode 5 (audit existing component for drift).

phrases.phrase: check the token usage in card-ui for drift
phrases.rationale: Mode 5 — token audit procedure.

phrases.phrase: lifecycle audit on dropdown-ui — symmetric connected/disconnected?
phrases.rationale: Mode 5 — lifecycle audit.

phrases.phrase: extend the LLM bridge to add a new provider
phrases.rationale: Mode 6 (extend LLM bridge).

phrases.phrase: modify createAdapter in @adia-ai/llm to add chunk-shape support
phrases.rationale: Mode 6 — explicit createAdapter + @adia-ai/llm mention.

phrases.phrase: set up the LLM-bridge surface for a new tool-call provider
phrases.rationale: Mode 6 trigger phrase.

phrases.phrase: make sure adia-ui-authoring knows about the new sidecar field
phrases.rationale: Mode 7 (§Teach) — explicit 'make sure adia-ui-authoring knows about X'.

phrases.phrase: train the authoring skill on the admin-shell helper pattern
phrases.rationale: Mode 7 — 'train the skill on Y' trigger.

phrases.phrase: absorb this new module-promotion pattern into adia-ui-authoring
phrases.rationale: Mode 7 — 'absorb this pattern into adia-ui-authoring' trigger.

phrases.phrase: author a demo for the billing-overview composite
phrases.rationale: Mode 8 (author demo / examples.html for composite or module).

phrases.phrase: compose the examples.html for dashboard-layout
phrases.rationale: Mode 8 — 'compose examples.html for Y' trigger.

phrases.phrase: write the demo for <integrations-page-ui> in packages/web-modules/settings
phrases.rationale: Mode 8 — 'write the demo for `<module-ui>`' trigger + web-modules path.

phrases.phrase: compose this Figma mock into AdiaUI components for our consumer app
phrases.rationale: Adversarial — consumer-composition territory (composing screens FROM existing primitives in consumer code). Authoring skill explicitly NEG-clauses 'composing screens from existing primitives'.

phrases.phrase: cut a release of the next version and publish the npm packages
phrases.rationale: Adversarial — release territory. Authoring skill NEG-clauses 'cutting a release'.

phrases.phrase: tune the zettel composition coverage; eval is at 38%
phrases.rationale: Adversarial — a2ui pipeline (compose strategies, eval coverage). Authoring NEG-clauses 'generation-pipeline internals'.

phrases.phrase: build a user profile card with avatar and edit actions
phrases.rationale: Adversarial — canonical consumer-composition task (build UI from intent). Should NOT route to authoring.

phrases.phrase: deploy the api service to the hosting platform
phrases.expected_alternative: a deployment/ops skill (out of this plugin's scope)
phrases.rationale: Adversarial — deployment/ops territory. Off-topic for authoring.

phrases.phrase: explain how React hooks work
phrases.rationale: Adversarial — generic framework knowledge. Should not activate any AdiaUI skill.

evaluator_notes.current_state: 30 cases (24 trigger + 6 adversarial). Modes 1-8 each have 3 trigger cases. Adversarial cases cover the sibling forge skills (adia-ui-release, adia-ui-a2ui), the consumer-side composition plugin (adia-ui-factory), a generic deployment/ops boundary, and bare-framework.
evaluator_notes.scoring_notes_detail: The bundled heuristic scorer (${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/lib/run-skill-evals.mjs) computes token overlap between each phrase and the adia-ui-authoring description field. PASS = trigger phrases score above threshold AND adversarial phrases score below. The threshold is auto-calibrated per corpus run. This is a HEURISTIC: a phrase that fails the heuristic may still route correctly via the actual harness (which has additional signals — context, prior turns, file paths). Use misroutes as input for description-field tightening, not as harness ground truth.
evaluator_notes.promotion_criteria: Promote to a CI gate (warn → hard-fail) when F1 ≥ 0.85 on this corpus across 3+ consecutive runs without description edits. Until then, run advisorily after every description change to detect regressions.
evaluator_notes.review_cadence: Re-run on every adia-ui-authoring description edit (skill.json or SKILL.md frontmatter). Add 1-2 new cases per checkpoint reflecting newly-observed routing failure modes.
evaluator_notes.known_limitations: Mode 4 (promote inline → module) and Mode 8 (composite demo authoring) have semantic overlap with each other ('lift to web-modules' vs 'author demo for module') — heuristic scorer may not disambiguate; the harness with mode-routing context will. Mode 7 (§Teach) is keyword-distinct ('make sure adia-ui-authoring knows', 'absorb pattern into') and should score reliably.
